decks.notes: This Modern 1 vs 1 combo deck revolves around generating mana quickly with cards like Ruby Medallion, Desperate Ritual, and Pyretic Ritual to cast a large spell like Grapeshot for massive damage. The deck includes cards like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Reckless Impulse to help dig for combo pieces and Past in Flames to recur key spells from the graveyard. The deck also includes Wrenn's Resolve for protection and filtering, as well as Artist's Talent and Thundering Falls for additional card advantage. The goal is to assemble the combo pieces quickly and overwhelm the opponent with a powerful spell.

This deck focuses on utilizing a mix of aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent and control the board. By playing a combination of powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Scion of Draco, along with spells like Lightning Bolt and Fatal Push, the deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent while dealing with any threats they may present. Additionally, cards like Leyline of the Guildpact and Stubborn Denial help protect your own creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The deck focuses on creating a fast-paced, aggressive playstyle using creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride to deal damage quickly to the opponent. It also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Seasoned Pyromancer for additional creature support and removal. The deck aims to maintain board presence and control through cards like Goblin Bombardment and Thraben Charm. Additionally, it includes some utility cards like The Legend of Roku and Voice of Victory to provide additional advantages in combat. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive strategy with a mix of lands that can produce both white and red mana.

This deck focuses on quickly getting creatures into the graveyard and then bringing them back into play using instant speed reanimation spells like Goryo's Vengeance and Superior Spider-Man, creating a powerful combo. The deck also includes cards like Ephemerate and Thoughtseize for control and disruption. Atraxa, Grand Unifier helps to support the combo strategy by providing additional value and protection. The variety of lands and spells allows for flexibility in mana fixing and card selection, ensuring consistent and explosive plays throughout the game.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's mana base and controlling the board with land destruction spells like Cleansing Wildfire and Field of Ruin. It also utilizes removal spells like Path to Exile and Galvanic Discharge to deal with threats. The key strategy is to slow down the opponent's game plan while staying ahead on resources with card advantage spells like Price of Freedom and Wrath of the Skies. The deck aims to establish a dominating position through efficient removal and disruption before closing out the game with powerful finishers like Solitude and Avengers Disassembled.

The deck focuses on assembling a combo with Broodscale Bloodchief to generate immense value by sacrificing creatures and utilizing powerful effects such as Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble. The deck aims to disrupt opponents with cards like Unholy Heat and Urza's Saga while also utilizing cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Emrakul, the Promised End as threats. The deck also includes mana ramp and card selection elements to ensure the combo pieces come together efficiently. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its combo potential and disruptive elements.

This deck focuses on utilizing the synergy between creatures such as Basking Broodscale and Glaring Fleshraker alongside spells like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble to create a powerful combo. The deck also includes various support cards like Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga to help ramp up the necessary resources for the combo to succeed. By carefully managing your resources and timing your plays, you can overwhelm your opponent with a lethal combination of creatures and spells to secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, then bringing them back onto the battlefield with cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate. By combining instant reanimation with protection spells like Solitude and Force of Negation, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures early in the game. The inclusion of card draw and disruption spells like Faithful Mending and Thoughtseize helps to control the game and ensure the combo can be assembled effectively.

This deck focuses on using the UrzaTron lands to quickly ramp up mana and cast powerful Eldrazi creatures such as Emrakul, the Promised End and Thought-Knot Seer. It also utilizes control elements like Ugin, the Spirit Dragon and All Is Dust to clear the board and disrupt the opponent's strategies. Karn, the Great Creator provides additional utility by searching for important artifacts like Trinisphere and Chalice of the Void. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful threats.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the synergy between Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief to generate a powerful combo. By using cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Kozilek's Command, the deck aims to control the board while building up its own creatures. Additionally, the deck includes Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End for added power. With support from Urza's Saga and Ancient Stirrings to tutor for key pieces, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its combo potential and strong creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly generate mana with cards like Manamorphose, Pyretic Ritual, and Desperate Ritual in order to cast a large number of spells in a single turn. This deck aims to utilize Ral, Monsoon Mage's ability to copy spells and deal damage to the opponent, eventually finishing them off with a Grapeshot. Past in Flames allows you to recast spells from your graveyard, while Wrenn's Resolve helps to protect your combo pieces. The deck also includes cards like Scalding Tarn and Arid Mesa to fetch specific lands and maintain consistency.

The key concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful spells. By using cards like Magmatic Hellkite, Omnath, Locus of Creation, and Shardless Agent, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. Additionally, the inclusion of Leyline Binding and Solitude provides control elements to help deal with threats from the opponent. With a diverse range of colors and card types, this deck is versatile and can adapt to different situations in order to secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing control elements such as counterspells, removal spells, and hand disruption to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building up its own resources. It also includes powerful finishers like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to close out the game once it has established control. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by efficiently handling threats and generating card advantage, ultimately outlasting the opponent to secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures with persistent abilities to create a versatile toolbox for assembling powerful combos. By tutoring for specific creatures with Green Sun's Zenith and using Yawgmoth, Thran Physician's sacrifice ability, the deck can control the board while steadily building towards a game-winning combo. Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Malevolent Rumble provide additional value through recurring creature recursion and direct damage, respectively. With a mix of aggressive early-game creatures and resilient late-game threats, the deck aims to outvalue and overwhelm opponents through strategic creature interactions.

The deck focuses on generating mana quickly through ramp spells and Eldrazi lands. It aims to control the game with powerful sweepers like Ugin's Labyrinth and Malevolent Rumble, while also utilizing cards like Kozilek's Command to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The end goal is to summon massive Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and World Breaker to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory. The deck's strategy revolves around quickly ramping into powerful threats to dominate the game.

This deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly with Eldrazi Temple and Ugin's Labyrinth to bring out powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Glaring Fleshraker. The key mechanic revolves around sacrificing creatures to generate value with cards like Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command. The combination of efficient removal spells and resilient threats makes it difficult for opponents to keep up with the deck's relentless aggression, ultimately overwhelming them to secure victory.
